message:
fix(node): add receipt expiry and L1 linkage checks to oracle release gate

Strengthen the n-version oracle release gate by validating that
policy receipts are both non-expired and have valid L1 linkage before
accepting them as divergence coverage.  This prevents stale or
unlinked receipts from silently passing the gate.

API changes:
- check_release_gate() and generate_report() now take now_epoch_secs
  parameter for deterministic expiry evaluation
- lockstep_harness.rs: Update all call sites to pass 0 (test epoch),
  and simplify nested if-let to let-chain syntax

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
